title: Geometry Dash level - Reborn
description: Custom Geometry Dash level designed to demonstrate advanced level design skills with a target difficulty of 7★.

The level focuses on structured pacing, obstacle timing, and progression of mechanical complexity, aiming to create a balanced experience that challenges player reflexes while maintaining readability.
It was developed as a personal design showcase within the Geometry Dash level editor, focusing on refining timing-based gameplay flow and difficulty tuning.
The level remains unpublished due to platform-related publishing constraints.
